situation: audit-2026-07-08-044 finding PA-POST-L-001: relay_bridge.py _check_token returns True when RELAY_TOKEN env is empty, silently bypassing auth in misconfigured prod deployments. Route-fix dispatched per audit-cycle-state status=fix-in-progress.
action: Fail-closed guard: when RELAY_TOKEN is empty, _check_token now logs 'auth_denied reason=relay_token_not_configured' and returns False instead of True. Operator must set PA_RELAY_TOKEN or PA_API_TOKEN to enable relay. audit_findings.finding: PA-POST-L-001: RELAY_TOKEN empty makes _check_token always return True, 403 path bypassed. Silent open-relay risk when .env missing in prod.
audit_findings.remediation: Fail closed: log warning and return False when RELAY_TOKEN unconfigured. Operator must explicitly enable via env var.
